findings.title: phone-guard-reeval Argo job silently processes 0 brands (brand RLS blocks cross-brand SELECT without GUC)
findings.note: Fail-closed direction (safer than data leak). D-1 windowing non-functional. Fix: brand enumeration via a superuser-scoped pool or a system API.

findings.title: window_days reference column hardcoded to 30 in shared_utility_identifier UPSERT
findings.note: Cosmetic data integrity issue only. The load-bearing suppressed_until timestamp IS correctly computed from brandConfig.suppression_window_days. The column is a reference-only annotation.

findings.title: Pre-existing HIGH (fastify@4.29.1 CVE GHSA-jx2c-rxcm-jvmq) and CRITICAL (handlebars/vitest) in devDeps — not introduced by this branch
findings.note: Confirmed not introduced by feat-identity-graph. Only new dep is @types/node devDep on identity-core. Pre-existing debt; must be tracked and patched separately.
